bird.name: 厚嘴海鴉
bird.summary: 厚嘴海鴉（Thick-billed murre，學名：Uria lomvia），又稱布倫尼希海雀（Brünnich's guillemot），是海雀科海鴉屬的兩個物種之一，另一個是崖海鴉。 厚嘴海鴉首先於十八世紀由瑞典自然學家卡爾·林奈在其著作《自然系統》當中描述。其另稱「布倫…

relations.subject: 厚嘴海鴉
relations.evidence: Although declines have been observed in many parts of their range, the thick-billed murre is not a species of concern as the total population is estimated to contain between 15 and 20 million individuals worldwide. thumb|Group on rocks, Alaska Egg harvesting and hunting of adult birds are major threats in Greenland, where populations fell steeply between the 1960s and 1980s. In the Barents Sea region, the species has declined locally, due to influences associated with polar stations in Russia
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.subject: 厚嘴海鴉
relations.evidence: Pollution from oil at sea exerts another major threat
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

relations.subject: 厚嘴海鴉
relations.evidence: Murres are among the seabirds most sensitive to oil contamination. Incidental mortality brought on by entanglement with fishing gear is also an important cause of population decline. Thick-billed murres are closely associated with sea-ice throughout the year. Consequently, some scientists believe that climate change may be a threat to this Arctic-breeding species. However the species seems adaptable
relations.object_summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。
